target_idiom: bầu ơi thương lấy bí cùng, tuy rằng khác giống nhưng chung một giàn
source_meaning: to put oneself in the place of another; to do unto others as you would have them do unto you
person of royal lineage; descendants of aristocracy
target_meaning: child or grandchild of an important person, a nepo baby

source_meaning: woman in the prostitutes' quarter; prostitute; courtesan
target_meaning: working girl; female prostitute; literally "flower-selling girl"

source_meaning: a location with forbidding and dangerous terrain
target_meaning: dangerous place that is difficult to access and full of obstacles

source_meaning: someone benefits from their misdeeds, while someone else is punished or suffers consequences on behalf of the wrongdoer
target_meaning: benefactors often get hatred from beneficiaries; no good deed goes unpunished

source_meaning: There will not be a fourth time. / One should not make the same action or mistake more than three times.
target_meaning: after three attempts, the chance of the success decreases greatly

source_meaning: do not fear correcting one's mistakes when they have been made
target_meaning: When making a mistake, do not be afraid to correct it.

target_idiom: quân ta đánh thắng quân mình

source_meaning: to wear one's heart on one's sleeve; to be frank and sincere
target_meaning: wearing one's heart on one's sleeve

source_meaning: used as an exclamation requesting that the decapitation of a prisoner be stayed or suspended: Spare him / her!
target_meaning: Holy Mother of God!; Mother of mercy!; literally "Father and Mother!"

source_meaning: old and powerless; aged and impotent
target_meaning: to impotent, unable to achieve or sustain an erection, having impotentia coeundi

source_meaning: to do something entirely by oneself (when it can be done by more people); to be in a one-man band
target_meaning: to compose and perform all by oneself

target_idiom: vắng chủ nhà, gà vọc niêu tôm
target_meaning: when the cat's away the mice will play

source_meaning: to make a bad situation worse; to add insult to injury; to rub salt in the wound

target_idiom: yêu nhiều thì ốm, ôm nhiều thì yếu
target_meaning: love a lot and you will get sick, hug a lot and you will get weak (alluding to STD and impotence due to overindulgence)

source_meaning: chữ Hán form of âm thịnh dương suy (“(informal, figurative, of a place) having more females than males”).
